title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: UNION SCHOOL DISTRICT SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, including sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, dental, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. Youth internship and advocacy support, and youth adult partnership training and coaching. 540 Main Street Union, OR 97883 Eligibility: Students and staff only, others are for all children 0-19 in the school district Hours: Monday-Wednesday 8:30am-3pm (541) 562-9418 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 562-9418 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Union School District SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNION SCHOOL DISTRICT SBHC
